operating_ranges.evidence: RAC tubes with embedded but virtually free-radiating heating element - Maximum element temperature: 1,250°C (2,280°F)
Provides heating for tubular furnace configurations with diameters up to 500mm
Exclusively used for heating tubes - Heating Wire Material: Kanthal® A-1 or Kanthal® APM heating wire - Wire Diameter: 5 mm (0.20 in)

degradation_mechanisms.evidence: Care is necessary when integrating heating elements due to the potential for corrosion

assumptions.statement: Tubes operate as virtually free-radiating heating elements
assumptions.reason: Manual states 'Heating element rests on surface of insulation and functions as virtually free-radiating element' for Principle II design used exclusively for heating tubes

assumptions.statement: Flexible wire connections are not suitable for tubes
assumptions.reason: Manual explicitly states 'Due to high current levels, flexible wire connections are not an option' for tubes
